flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at California Aeronautical University fell 93% between 2022 and 2024 (66.7% → 4.3%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at California Aeronautical University rose 54% between 2006 and 2009 ($4.6k → $7.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at California Aeronautical University fell 31% between 2021 and 2024 (43.8% → 30.2%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at California Aeronautical University rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.3k → $37.7k).
